description_long: This object consists of four identical, faceted balloon envelopes arranged in a loose cluster above a flat, rectangular base. The envelopes are polygonal and colored in a gradient of blue shades, with lighter tones at the top and darker at the bottom, giving a stylized, geometric appearance. The base is a reddish-brown rectangle with a repeating triangular pattern and blue-and-white oval shapes, possibly representing shadows or reflections of the balloons above. There is no visible basket, burner frame, or suspension cables connecting the envelopes to the base or to each other. The overall design is abstract and stylized, lacking realistic hot-air balloon construction details. The asset appears to be a conceptual or decorative representation rather than a functional hot-air balloon.
description: A stylized cluster of four blue, faceted balloon envelopes hovers above a patterned reddish-brown rectangular base, with no visible basket or cables.
description_view_0: Four blue polygonal balloons are seen above a patterned base, with the ovals on the base most clearly visible.
description_view_1: The balloons are viewed from an angle, showing the triangular pattern on the base and less of the blue ovals.
description_view_2: The blue ovals on the base are prominent, and the balloons are symmetrically arranged above.
description_view_3: The base's pattern is more visible from the side, with the balloons appearing to float above and the ovals partially obscured.
attribute_envelope_pattern: The balloon envelopes are solid blue with a faceted, polygonal design, while the base features a repeating triangular pattern with blue-and-white ovals. The pattern on the base is geometric and visually distinct from the plain envelopes.
